Ghost Members.trigger_condition: No flight, redemption, or point accumulation activity in past 90+ days
Ghost Members.offer_type: Reactivation bonus — 2,000 bonus points on next flight booked within 30 days
Ghost Members.timing: Send immediately upon trigger; follow up at day 14 if no booking
Ghost Members.success_metric: Flight booked within 30 days of campaign send

Crown Holders.trigger_condition: High-value Aurora member with low engagement in last 6 months
Crown Holders.offer_type: Upgrade experience offer (lounge access, priority boarding)
Crown Holders.timing: Send within 7 days of activity decline; quarterly touchpoint
Crown Holders.success_metric: Positive response or booking within 90 days of outreach

Drifting Stars.trigger_condition: Once frequent flyer with >50% decline in flight frequency in past 6 months
Drifting Stars.offer_type: We miss you campaign with a time-limited double-miles offer on Fall season bookings
Drifting Stars.timing: Send at start of historically preferred season (Fall)
Drifting Stars.success_metric: Flight booked for Fall season within 45 days of campaign send

Silent Investors.trigger_condition: Accumulated points balance above 25,000 with zero redemptions in past 12 months
Silent Investors.offer_type: Redemption nudge — personalized point balance email with curated redemption options
Silent Investors.timing: Send monthly statement email with clear call-to-action to redeem points
Silent Investors.success_metric: Points redemption within 60 days of email send

Budget Explorers.trigger_condition: Nova/Star tier member with stable low-frequency booking pattern
Budget Explorers.offer_type: Partner reward offer (hotel, car rental discount)
Budget Explorers.timing: Send during off-peak periods (January/February) to stimulate partner activity
Budget Explorers.success_metric: Partner offer redemption within 60 days of send
